title: Sawariya Seth Temple
tagline: Sawariya Seth Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Sawariya Seth temple or Sanwaliya Ji Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Chittorgarh district of Rajasthan state of India dedicated to Krishna.
overview.description: Sawariya Seth temple or Sanwaliya Ji Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Chittorgarh district of Rajasthan state of India dedicated to Krishna. The temple is also known as Shri Sanwaliya Seth.

topPlaces.name: Bansen
topPlaces.description: Bansen is a small village situated in the Chittorgarh district of Rajasthan, India. It is situated on national highway 76 and has a population of around 5000, mostly farmers.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sawariya Seth Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sawariya Seth Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sawariya Seth Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (51 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (72 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sawariya Seth Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sawariya Seth Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sawariya Seth Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sawariya Seth Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
